Problem:

{

Submitted final result text:
FINAL_ANSWER: 1/\mu(a/a_0)
JUSTIFICATION: In the context of MOND-modified gravity applied to Unruh-de Sitter temperatures, the effective acceleration is scaled by the inverse of the interpolation function \mu(x). Since the Unruh temperature $T_U$ is proportional to the acceleration $a$, and the de Sitter-modified temperature $T_{dS}$ incorporates the MONDian modification where $a_{eff} = a / \mu(a/a_0)$, the ratio $T_U(a)/T_{dS}(a)$ simplifies to the inverse of the interpolation function, $1/\mu(a/a_0)$.
